possible_choices: That generated recommendations are unreliable when little data about user preferences has been collected, yet.
That deep learning-based recommender systems need a lot of data to be trained.
That data imputation is needed before using data to train recommender systems.
That a recommender system tends to be slow when it is first initialized.
choice_explanations: This would have been the correct answer.
Not quite. That is true but the cold start problem refers to something else.
